original: Start of Imperial Indication
Liberius ends his reign as Catholic Pope
Synod of Hertford opens; canons made for English Church

Catholic uprising in the Free and Hanseatic City of Lübeck (now Germany) fails

Danish Renaissance Kronborg Castle guarding Øresund Sound, is mostly destroyed in a fire (later rebuilt)
Jacques Specx appointed governor-general of Dutch-Indies
